name: business-website-skill
description: Build client-ready corporate, brand, B2B, service, and proposal-grade business websites from source materials with phased discovery, evidence mapping, SEO/GEO readiness, design direction choices, implementation, and QA.
author: 月瑀科技 YUEYU TECH
copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 月瑀科技 YUEYU TECH

templates.name: static-business-site
templates.description: Dependency-free static business website starter with generic placeholders.

preview_assets.asset_policy: Preview PNG/GIF/JPG files are optional human-facing documentation assets. The agent workflow works from markdown references, JSON presets, scripts, and templates without loading binary previews. External release or LFS migration requires an explicit history-rewrite plan.

scripts.name: generate_preview_assets
scripts.description: Regenerates style preview images and interaction GIFs from the preset catalog.

scripts.name: audit_static_site
scripts.description: Checks local static site assets, anchors, duplicate IDs, viewport metadata, image alt attributes, CSS url() references, and optional strict SEO/GEO launch metadata.

compatibility.notes: Core workflow uses SKILL.md, references, scripts, and assets. agents/openai.yaml is Codex-specific UI metadata and can be ignored by other runtimes. Claude Code diagnostic feedback has been incorporated, but full Phase 0-7 runtime testing should be recorded before moving it from diagnosed to tested.

related_skills.name: proposal-ppt-skill
related_skills.description: Create stage-gated business proposal decks and presenter scripts.

related_skills.name: yueyu-skill
related_skills.description: Query YUEYU TECH company and marketing-service information.

related_skills.name: dy-creative-skill
related_skills.description: Query related marketing services and lead capture workflows.
